summary: Completed frontend testing of Pipeline Summary card enhancement and Breakdown Drawer feature (iteration 230). All 16 features verified and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Summary card and Breakdown Drawer testing complete (iteration 230). All features verified: [1] Pipeline Summary card shows headline 'You're in a good position — 2 schools need attention'. [2] 3 status chips visible: '2 need attention now' (red), '2 need a follow-up soon' (orange), '1 is on track' (green). [3] Momentum signals: risk signal 'Emory University has gone quiet (8 days)', positive signal 'Stanford University and University of Florida are gaining momentum'. [4] 'View full breakdown →' CTA button visible and clickable. [5] Clicking CTA opens right-side drawer overlay. [6] Drawer has backdrop overlay that dims the page. [7] Drawer 'Since your last update' section shows AI narrative bullets (Stanford, Florida, UCLA momentum). [8] Drawer 'Momentum breakdown' shows Gaining momentum (Stanford, Florida, UCLA), Cooling off (Emory), Holding steady (Creighton). [9] Drawer 'Per-school details' shows each school with Priority badge (High/Medium/Low) and reasons. [10] Emory shows 'Overdue follow-up (2 days)', 'No response after last outreach', 'Coach flagged this'. [11] Drawer 'Coaching insights' section shows 3 insight bullets. [12] Drawer shows 'Insights updated 45 minutes ago' freshness timestamp. [13] Close button (X) in drawer header closes the drawer. [14] Clicking backdrop overlay closes the drawer. [15] No system/internal language like 'score' or 'priority factor' appears anywhere. [16] Main page (hero, next moves) remains visible behind the drawer backdrop.
